ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key in the daily note's frontmatter where new-note links are appended.
ast.target: 每日笔记 frontmatter 中用于追加新笔记链接的键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated file extensions to track. Leave the dot off.
ast.target: 要跟踪的文件扩展名，用逗号分隔。请省略点号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated folder paths whose new files should be ignored.
ast.target: 要忽略其新文件的文件夹路径，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When today's daily note doesn't exist yet, create it from your template.
ast.target: 当今天的每日笔记尚不存在时，从您的模板创建它。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 如果缺失则创建每日笔记

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Core daily notes plugin is not enabled.
ast.target: 核心每日笔记插件未启用。
